actions.command: export PATH="$HOME/.vite-plus/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" && pnpm exec nx --version 2>&1 | tail -3 && echo "---" && pnpm exec nx graph --file=/tmp/nx-graph.json 2>&1 | tail -3

GIT_AUTHOR_NAME="red" GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL="jpleva91@gmail.com" GIT_COMMITTER_NAME="red" GIT_COMMITTER_EMAIL="jpleva91@gmail.com" git -c user.name=red -c user.email=jpleva91@gmail.com add -A && git -c user.name=red -c user.email=jpleva91@gmail.com commit -m "chore: scaffold Nx workspace (integrated, pnpm, ts) — nx 22.6.5, pnpm 10.33, node 22" 2>&1 | tail -3

export PATH="$HOME/.vite-plus/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" && for pkg in vite vitest oxlint rolldown @oxlint/oxlint @oxc-project/oxfmt tsgo @typescript/native-preview better-sqlite3 zod commander chokidar @types/better-sqlite3 @types/node tsx; do
  v=$(npm view "$pkg" version 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -z "$v" ]; then echo "NOT PUBLISHED: $pkg"; else printf "%-40s %s\n" "$pkg" "$v"; fi
done

for pkg in '@oxc/formatter' 'oxc-formatter' 'oxfmt' '@oxc-project/oxfmt' 'oxc-fmt' 'oxfmt-cli'; do
  v=$(npm view "$pkg" version 2>/dev/null)
  if [ -n "$v" ]; then printf "%-30s %s\n" "$pkg" "$v"; fi
done
echo "--- oxlint CLI help ---"
npx -y --no oxlint --help 2>&1 | grep -iE '(format|fmt)' | head -5 || true

export PATH="$HOME/.vite-plus/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" && pnpm config set --location=project onlyBuiltDependencies '["better-sqlite3","@swc/core","esbuild","nx"]' 2>&1 | tail -3 && cat .npmrc 2>&1 | head -5 && pnpm rebuild better-sqlite3 2>&1 | tail -5

export PATH="$HOME/.vite-plus/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" && cat > .npmrc <<'EOF'
onlyBuiltDependencies[]=better-sqlite3
onlyBuiltDependencies[]=@swc/core
onlyBuiltDependencies[]=esbuild
onlyBuiltDependencies[]=nx
EOF
pnpm rebuild 2>&1 | tail -5
export PATH="$HOME/.vite-plus/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" && pnpm exec oxlint --version 2>&1 | head -3 && echo "---" && pnpm exec oxlint . 2>&1 | tail -5
export PATH="$HOME/.vite-plus/bin:$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v22.22.1/bin:$PATH" && pnpm exec eslint --version 2>&1 | head -3 && pnpm exec eslint . 2>&1 | tail -10
